'''Fizzik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[X'Ting]] from [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. who served as the broodmate of gang leader [[Trillot]], who later became leader of [[Cestus Cybernetics]]. Prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Trillot ordered Fizzik to escort [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] through the warrens. After the [[Mission to Ord Cestus]] and Trillot's death at the hands of Ventress for her failure, Fizzik took control of his late sister's crime organization as the planet joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
